name: Locoia
description: Locoia — low-code iPaaS from Germany with GDPR-first architecture. Visual flow builder for SaaS, databases, and custom API integrations.

seo.title: Locoia — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Locoia: Locoia — low-code iPaaS from Germany with GDPR-first architecture. Visual flow builder for SaaS, databases, and custom API integrations.

when_to_use: German GDPR-first iPaaS for connecting SaaS and databases
Low-code integration workflows with EU data residency
Connecting legacy on-prem systems to cloud SaaS without ETL
ERP and CRM integration with full audit logs for compliance
White-label integration automation for German enterprise clients

pros: Low-code builder accessible to ops teams
German quality bias on SLA and support
cons: Brand awareness limited outside German market
Connector catalog smaller than Make or Zapier
Pricing less competitive for very small teams
review.verdict: Practical EU-native iPaaS for German mid-market; globally overshadowed by Make and Zapier.
review.best_for: German and EU mid-market teams needing GDPR-compliant automation
review.not_for: Global teams wanting the largest connector catalog and community
